description: Review the implemented acquisition slice before E2E rollout. Verify persisted behavior lives in Ash actions/resources, callers use domain code interfaces, workflow transitions remain behind intent-named facades, LiveViews do not build business queries, AshOban owns durable work, AshLua transactions protect composed writes, and no new Jido agent runtime exists. Acceptance: violations are fixed or split into blocking beads; compile warnings, focused tests, format, generated resource map, and architecture-smell checks pass.
title: Run mid-epic Ash architecture quality gate
